description: Partnership document in the "silk business" (עסק המשי). Date: Kislev 5562 AM (1801 CE). Location: Cairo. Several people are named in the opening lines. The partners include Efrayim ʿAdda and Shimʿon ʿEzrī as well as a third partner whose name is badly damaged with only two letters intact (l. 3). Fortunately, the third partner's initialד survive in later lines as the abbreviation הרמ׳׳ץ which points to the likelihood that his surname was Ṣevī. The partnership was set to last for two years. The document may have once included a signatures section that has been lost to damage. MCD.
description_he: מסמך שותפות ב'עסק המשי'. קהיר, כסלו תקס"ב (1801 לספירה). השותפים: אפרים עדה, שמעון עזרי ושותף שלישי ששמו פגוע (שם משפחתו כנראה צבי - הרמ'ץ). תקופת השותפות: שנתיים. MCD.
